background: Homeworld: Scandia/Arcturus (B5559D-F). From occupied world under Imperial military rule since 1002. 'Frost' nickname from cold strategic calculations and ice-world origin. 44 years undermining Imperial control. This mission is personal - Rushorin defecting through his occupied homeworld.
education: Solomani Naval Academy (final years before occupation)
terms: Navy (Command): Leadership-1, Tactics (naval)-1, Admin-1. Served in final years of Solomani Rim War. Advanced to rank 1.
Navy (Command): Leadership-2, Gunner (capital)-1, Pilot (capital ships)-1. War ended. Scandia occupied. Continued service with remnant Confederation Navy. Advanced to rank 2.
Navy (Flight): Tactics (naval)-2, Electronics (sensors)-1. Joint operations with Vegan auxiliary forces. Learned to respect Vegan tactical discipline. Advanced to rank 1.
Navy (Flight): Leadership-3, Admin-2. Advocated for stronger Confederation-Vegan cooperation. Advanced to rank 2.
Navy (Flight): Electronics (sensors)-2, Computer-1. Strategic planning and sensor operations. Advanced to rank 3. Mustering out: gained contacts in Vegan military.
Agent (Intelligence): Diplomat-1, Persuade-1, Investigate-1. Recruited by SolSec External Directorate. Specialized in undermining Imperial occupation. Advanced to rank 1.
Agent (Intelligence): Diplomat-2, Persuade-2, Language (vegan)-1. 44 years of covert operations against Imperial control of Scandia. Advanced to rank 2.

Agent (Intelligence): Gun Combat (energy)-1. Current assignment: Reversed Engineering operation. Mission commander. Reports to Minister Feng Banerjee. Advanced to rank 3. Mustering out: Command Armor, Gauss Pistol, Tactical Computer, Secure Command Comms, 10000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Strategic planning, naval tactics, command operations, diplomacy, intelligence operations, sensor analysis, Vegan military cooperation, capital ship operations
Weaknesses: Ideology over humanity, cold and calculating, willing to sacrifice for strategic victory, personal vendetta against Imperial occupation may cloud judgment
